professionalTitle: Senior Software Engineer — Cloud, Automation & SaaS Architect
testimonialTitle: What folks I've built for say
faqTitle: No question too small, no doubt left hanging.

faq.question: What’s your engagement model?
faq.answer: Scoped projects or retainers. Async-first, demos weekly. No surprises (except pleasant ones).

faq.question: How do you ensure quality?
faq.answer: CI/CD pipelines, automated tests, linting, perf budgets, observability. Basically, quality with receipts.

faq.question: What stacks do you prefer?
faq.answer: TypeScript, React/Next.js, Node, Python, AWS, Postgres, Redis, edge functions. Not married to stacks, just committed to excellence.

faq.question: Do you work solo or with teams?
faq.answer: Both. I play well with others but also know how to score when I’m the striker.

faq.question: Can you rescue legacy codebases?
faq.answer: Yes. Like Indiana Jones, but instead of whips, I use git rebase.

faq.question: How do you handle deadlines?
faq.answer: With respect, caffeine, and ruthless prioritization.

faq.question: What industries have you worked in?
faq.answer: Fintech, SaaS, e-commerce, healthcare, logistics—you name it, I’ve probably scaled it.

faq.question: Do you do architecture or just coding?
faq.answer: Both. Think architect who also isn’t afraid to grab a hammer.

faq.question: How do you communicate?
faq.answer: Async by default, but always clear. Slack, email, Notion, carrier pigeon if required.

faq.question: What makes you different from other devs?
faq.answer: Global experience, obsession with scalability, and humor sharp enough to cut through legacy spaghetti code.

faq.question: Do you work with startups or enterprises?
faq.answer: Both. From scrappy MVPs to Fortune 500 migrations, I’ve seen—and fixed—it all.

faq.question: Can you handle cloud infrastructure?
faq.answer: Absolutely. AWS native. I eat IAM policies for breakfast.

faq.question: What’s your philosophy on software design?
faq.answer: Build for humans, optimize for scale, keep future developers from hating you.

faq.question: Do you do automation?
faq.answer: Yes. If it can be automated, I’ll automate it. If it can’t, I’ll try anyway.

faq.question: How do you keep skills sharp?
faq.answer: OSS contributions, side projects, conferences, reading RFCs for fun (don’t judge).

faq.question: Can you mentor or lead teams?
faq.answer: Yes. I’ve led teams across continents. Think Jedi master, but with code reviews.

faq.question: What’s your attitude toward bugs?
faq.answer: They’re just misunderstood features… until I squash them mercilessly.

faq.question: Do you work async with global teams?
faq.answer: Yes. My calendar is as timezone-friendly as my commits.

faq.question: What’s your delivery style?
faq.answer: Iterative, transparent, demo-driven. You’ll never wonder “what’s happening?”

faq.question: Why should we hire you?
faq.answer: Because I don’t just write code—I build leverage. And I make it fun along the way.

contact.subtitle: Got a project in mind? A burning question? Or just want to say hi? I'm always up for a good conversation and terrible programming puns.
contact.cardDesc: No spam, no sales pitches, just genuine human connection. Promise!
contact.subjectPlaceholder: Project collaboration, life advice, or your favorite debugging story
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your wildest coding dreams...
contact.footerNote: Built with ❤️ and probably too much caffeine. Response time: Usually < 24hrs
contact.successDesc: Thanks for reaching out! I'll get back to you faster than you can say 'async/await'.

ossPage.title: Open Source as My Supernova.
ossPage.subtitle: I don’t just ship code — I unleash systems. Brutal, battle-tested, and unapologetically opinionated. Fork it, break it, remix it. These aren’t playground demos. They’re living, breathing weapons for builders who dare.
ossPage.outro: Want to contribute, fork, or just peek under the hood? Every star ⭐ and pull request means a lot.
ossPage.productsDesc: A collection of production-ready tools and experiments, focusing on mobile and media applications.
ossPage.cloudDesc: A showcase of serverless functions, infrastructure as code, and other DevOps utilities I've built and open-sourced.
ossPage.playgroundDesc: A space for exploration, featuring data science experiments, and modern implementations of classic software.

loading.skipBtn: 🤖 I'm not here for logs, show me the code →

loading.dns: 📡 [NET] DNS lookup {{site}} → 93.184.216.34 ({{dns}}ms) [faster than your ex texting back]
loading.tcp: 🤝 [NET] TCP handshake ({{tcp}}ms): [SYN → SYN-ACK → ACK] [world’s most awkward handshake, completed]
loading.tls: 🔐 [SEC] TLS 1.3 (ALPN={{alpn}}, cipher=TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256) ({{tls}}ms) [basically Fort Knox with emojis]
loading.req: 📥 [REQ] GET / → 200 OK | content-type: text/html | TTFB={{ttfb}}ms [Google envies this speed]
loading.sec: 🛡️ [SEC] Cache: MISS | HSTS: enabled | CSP: "trust me bro"
loading.dom: ⚙️ [DOM] HTML parse={{parse}}ms | CSSOM={{css}}ms | JS compile={{jsCompile}}ms [done while sipping ☕️]
loading.render: 🎨 [RENDER] Layout={{layout}}ms | Paint={{paint}}ms [pixels aligned with OCD precision]
loading.metrics: 📊 [METRICS] FCP={{fcp}}ms | LCP={{lcp}}ms | CLS=0.01 [smoother than your favorite playlist]
loading.stor: 🗄️ [STOR] IndexedDB: opened in {{idb}}ms → settings, cache, secrets [don’t tell the NSA]
loading.wss: 🔌 [WSS] WebSocket alive ({{ws}}ms) [heartbeat steady, not a Tamagotchi]
